title: Blinded
summary: A blinded creature can’t see and automatically fails any ability check that requires sight.

items: A blinded creature can’t see and automatically fails any ability check that requires sight.
Attack rolls against the creature have advantage, and the creature’s attack rolls have disadvantage.

conditionRules: A blinded creature can’t see and automatically fails any ability check that requires sight.
